case_title: OMAR, FAROOQ IND/DBA SAVE MORE MARKET VS ASAD, SAMIR DBA VALU MAX OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY OMAR, FAROOQ IND/DBA SAVE MORE MARKET AS TO DEFENDANT ASAD, SAMIR DBA VALU MAX OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF FILED DECLARATION STATING DEFENDANT WAS NOT SERVED AND REQUESTS TO RESET TRIAL DATE.
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-28-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-25-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ASAD, SAMIR DBA VALU MAX OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ASAD, SAMIR DBA VALU MAX OF CALIFORNIA THE COURT DISMISSES PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS PREMATURELY FILED. PLAINTIFF MAY REFILE THIS ACTION WHEN ESCROW FOR THE SALE OF THE BUSINESS CLOSES, OR THE PURCHASE TRANSACTION IS TERMINATED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
